name: distcompute
description: Distributed Compute Cluster for LLM Training on browser-based workers

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist && cp -R src/public dist/
scripts.test: ts-node src/tests/test_vm.ts && ts-node src/tests/test_compiler.ts && ts-node src/tests/test_bugfixes.ts && ts-node src/tests/test_gpt.ts
